channel.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap Sep 19th - Sep 25th, 2022
item.description:
Editors

Mobile Editors

  • GoMap!! - Feature-rich mobile editor for iOS. (iOS / Source Codestars211 / Wiki)
  • Every Door - Every Door is an Android and iOS app that lets you create and edit objects in OpenStreetMap. It supports editing node and polygon features, and creating point features like shops, benches, and building entrances. (Android / iOS / Source Codestars142 / Wiki)

item.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap Aug 29th - Sep 4th, 2022
item.description:
Editors

Native Editors

  • Merkaartorstars262 - An opensource OSM editor, written in C++ and Qt

    • Maps

    Web Maps

  • Tracesmap - A map allowing for planning routes on OsmCarto and OpenTopoMap-derived retina maps.
  • OSM Landuse - OSM based landuse and landcover WebGIS application.
  • OsmAPP - A browsable map showing data and offering simple POI-editing capabilities. (Source Codestars51)

    • Maps

    Goal Tracking

  • CityStrides - A web platform that encourages the user to run every street in their city. Based on your Strava data it shows where you have and have not run, provides challenges, a leaderboard, and a forum.

    • Libraries

    Python

  • prettymappstars201 - Create beautiful maps from OpenStreetMap data.

item.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap Jul 11th - Jul 17th, 2022
item.description:
Maps

Web Maps

  • Cycle.Travel - An OSM-based bike route-planner, together with extensive editorial content about long-distance cycle routes and city cycling. (Wiki)

item.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap Jul 4th - Jul 10th, 2022
item.description:
Tasking Managers

  • OSM Streak - OSM Streak makes you do small tasks for OSM every day. Tasks are small and about five minutes each, but the point is to map every day, not map as much as you can. (Source Codestars23)

item.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap Jun 20th - Jun 26th, 2022
item.description:
Maps

Mobile Maps

  • Komoot - A route planner and navigation app specializing in hiking and cycling. (Android, iOS / Wiki)

    • Maps

    Web Maps

  • OpenLevelUp! - An OSM based indoor viewer.(Wiki)
  • AccessMap - A web map project to enable accessible, safe sidewalk trip planning for people with limited mobility. Currently rendering senveral cities in Washington State. (Source Code)

item.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap Jun 6th - Jun 12th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

Java

  • OSM2World - OSM2World is a converter that creates three-dimensional models of the world from OpenStreetMap data. It can be used as a stand-alone tool, on a server or as a library in Java programs. (Source Codestars423 / Wiki)

item.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap May 30th - Jun 5th, 2022
item.description:
Maps

Map Games

  • PraxisMapperstars18 - GPS Game server, for making mobile games around exploring the real world. (Source Codestars18)

item.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap May 23rd - May 29th, 2022
item.description:
Editors

Mobile Editors

  • StreetCompletestars2.9k - App for improving OSM by answering simple questions. (Android / Wiki)
  • Vespucci - Advanced full-data-model editor for Android. (Android / Source Codestars271 / Wiki)
  • OSM Go!stars76 - OSM Go! is an Android application and a Progressive Web Applications (PWA) for contributing to OpenStreetMap. (Android / WebApp / Source Codestars76 / Wiki)

item.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap Apr 11th - Apr 17th, 2022
item.description:
Changeset Tools

Web Services

  • osmcha - Detector for suspicious changesets. (Source Codestars98 / Wiki)
  • achavi - Augmented change viewer. (Source Codestars37 / Wiki)
  • Osm Change Viz - Changeset visualizer displaying information about added/modified/deleted elements in different panels.
  • changeset-map - Map visualizing changes in selected changesets. Used in OsmCha. (Source Codestars31)
  • OSM History Viewer - Changeset visualization. (Source Codestars7)
  • Who did it? - Map highlighting recent edits per tile. Provides RSS feeds for watching changes in custom bounding boxes. (Source Codestars64 / Wiki)

    • Maps

    Web Maps

  • osm-livechanges - Near-real-time display of edits in the OpenStreetMap database. (Source Codestars28)

item.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap Mar 28th - Apr 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Additional Resources

Websites

  • LearnOSM.org - Extensive beginners' guide to editing OpenStreetMap. (Wiki)
  • TeachOSM - Project assisting educators at all levels to introduce open source mapping and OpenStreetMap in the classroom. (Wiki)

    • Libraries

    JavaScript

  • MapLibre GL JS - A map renderer with GPU-accelerated vector tile rendering. (Source Codestars3.6k / See Related List)
  • Leaflet - An open-source JavaScript library for mobile-friendly interactive maps. (Source Codestars35.8k / Wiki)
  • OpenLayers - A high-performance library for rendering raster and vector maps. (Source Codestars9.5k / Wiki)

    • Related lists

  • awesome-maplibrestars122 - A collection of awesome things that use or support MapLibre!

    • Communities

    Global Communities

  • OpenStreetMap Community - Official forums hosted by the OpenStreetMap Foundation.
  • r/openstreetmap - Inofficial Reddit forum dedicated to sharing OSM related links and news.
  • “OpenStreetMap World” Discord - OSM related instant messaging and voice chat group.

    • Tools

    Web Tools

  • hdyc - Statistics viewer for contributions of any OSM user. (Wiki)
  • OpenMapTiles - Set of tools for self-hosted vector maps and map services with labels in more than 50 languages. (Source Code / Wiki)
  • OSMNames - Geocoding tool ranking places according to the corresponding Wikipedia page popularity. (Source Codestars286 / Wiki)
  • overpass-turbo - Web based data mining tool for OpenStreetMap using Overpass API. (Source Codestars588 / Wiki)
  • Osmose - QA-tool for fixing problems detected in OpenStreetMap data. (Source Code / Wiki)
  • taginfo - Website displaying information on tags and their usage. (Source Codestars108 / Wiki)
  • ohsome Dashboard - Tool for visualizing changes over a certain time period. (Wiki)

    • Maps

    Web Maps

  • indoor= - Map for viewing indoor data from OpenStreetMap. (Wiki)
  • Show me the way - Live map showing latest changes on aerial imagery. (Source Codestars123 / Wiki)
  • OSM In Realtime - Visualization of the changes made to OpenStreetMap as they happen. (Source Code / Wiki)
  • Qwant Maps - Modern map with POI search and routing functionality. (Wiki)
  • F4map Demo - 3D rendering demo of OpenStreetMap data. (Wiki)
  • FacilMap - Map with easy possibility to filter for POI types. (Source Codestars94 / Wiki)
  • Straßenraumkarte Neukölln - High-detail micromap of the district "Neukölln" of Berlin, Germany. (Wiki)

    • Editors

    Web Editors

  • iD - JavaScript based editor for the web browser with a wide array of presets. (Source Codestars2.9k / Wiki)
  • Level0 - Text based editor that's useful in specific corner cases. (Source Codestars48 / Wiki)
  • MapWith.ai - AI assisted versions of iD. (Meta-Repostars158 / Editor Source Codestars235 / Wiki)
  • OSMyBiz - Website for managing informations about your business. (Source Code / Wiki)
  • OnOSM - Allows anyone to submit business information as a note for inclusion into OSM. (Source Codestars62 / Wiki)
  • Deriviste - Provides a simple interface to add nodes to OpenStreetMap based on what you see in Mapillary street-level imagery. (Source Codestars29 / Wiki)
  • Healthsites.io - An online editor focused on adding and improving data on global health facilities. (Source Codestars126 / Wiki)

    • Editors

    Native Editors

  • JOSM - Advanced extensible desktop editor. (Source Code / Wiki)
  • Potlatch 3 - Native intermediate-level editor built in Adobe AIR. (Source Codestars15 / Wiki)

    • Tools

    Mobile Tools

  • OSMTrackerstars452 - Offline GPS tracking tool for recording GPX tracks. (Android / Wiki)

    • Tasking Managers

  • MapRoulette - Various challenges for making small edits to achive big tasks. (Source Codestars92 / Wiki)
  • Pic4Review - Tool for adding objects to OSM by reviewing images. (Source Code / Wiki)
  • Map Complete - Tool for mapping in scoped tasks. (Wiki)
  • Damn Project - Project for mapping by dividing big areas into small squares mappable by humans. (Source Code / Wiki)

    • Maps

    Mobile Maps

  • OsmAnd - Map viewing and navigation (routing) application with offline functionality available for Android and iOS. (Android, iOS / Source Code Androidstars3.4k / Source Code iOSstars161 / Wiki)
  • Organic Maps - A free offline maps app based on OSM. (Android, iOS / Source Codestars4k / Wiki)
  • Magic Earth - A free turn-by-turn navigation app. (Android, iOS / Wiki)

    • Maps

    Generators

  • Field Papers - Generate maps for printing, annotate them, and manage your notes after. (Source Codestars73 / Wiki)

    • Libraries

    C/C++

  • libosmiumstars358 - Fast and flexible C++ library for working with OpenStreetMap data. (Wiki)
  • OSRMstars5.2k - Routing engine for use in C++ applications. (Wiki)
  • mapnikstars3.2k - Combines pixel-perfect image output with lightning-fast cartographic algorithms, and exposes interfaces in C++, Python, and Node. (Wiki)

    • Libraries

    Python

  • osmapistars183 - Python wrapper for the OpenStreetMap API. (Wiki)
  • osmnxstars3.9k - Visualizer for street networks. (Wiki)

    • Libraries

    Java

  • OpenTripPlannerstars1.8k - Open source multi-modal trip planner. (Wiki)
  • GraphHopperstars3.8k - Open source route planning library and server using OpenStreetMap. (Wiki)

    • Public APIs

  • overpass - Read-only API that serves up custom selected parts of the OSM map data. (Source Codestars529 / Wiki)
  • planet.osm - Minutely/weekly/yearly/full dumps of osm data. (Wiki)
  • bbbike - Custom extracts of areas from planet.osm. (Wiki)

    • Miscellaneous

  • OpenGeofiction - A completely fictional user-made world map, created using the OSM software platform. (Wiki)

    • Video

    Global

  • State of the Map - YouTube channel of the State of the Map conference containing VoDs of talks. (Wiki)

item.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap Mar 21st - Mar 27th, 2022
item.description:
Maps

Web Maps

  • Road Curvature - Helps to find curvy roads for those who enjoy them. (Source Codestars178)

    • Maps

    Map Games

  • Back Of Your Hand - A web map game that tests your knowledge by having you find a street in a given area. (Source Codestars61)

    • Video

    Global

  • Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team (HOT) - YouTube channel of the HOT containing content regarding humanitarian OSM work.

    • Video

    Regional

  • OpenStreetMap Indonesia YouTube Channel
  • OpenStreetMap Poland YouTube Channel
  • OpenStreetMap US YouTube Channel

    • Tasking Managers

  • TeachOSM Tasking Manager - Tasking Manager made for school classrooms to help map for humanitarian causes.

item.title: osmlab/awesome-openstreetmap Mar 14th - Mar 20th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

JavaScript

  • node-mapnikstars514 - Node wrapper for mapnik.
  • openstreetmap-tag-mapstars7 - Tag for Riot.js to generate iframe-map from the country and region.
  • node-osmiumstars127 - Node wrapper for libosmium for working with OpenStreetMap data.

    • Libraries

    Python

  • python-mapnikstars146 - Python wrapper for mapnik.
  • overpass-wrapperstars299 - Wrapper around the OpenStreetMap Overpass API.
  • osmchastars37 - Python package to detect suspicious OSM changesets.

    • Articles

  • Volunteer armies map ‘invisible’ communities hit by coronavirus - OpenStreetMap contributors map over 1,100 handwashing stations. (5 min read, 2020-10-15, The Asahi Shimbun)

    • Tools

    Native Tools

  • Baremaps - Open source pipeline for producing Mapbox vector tiles from OpenStreetMap with Postgis and Java. (Source Codestars174)

    • Maps

    Web Maps

  • last-week-on-osm - Map for exploring latest changesets. (Source Codestars14)
  • Baato Before-After Maps - Generate before-after maps to visualize the work your local community has done. (Source Codestars20)

    • Maps

    Generators

  • MyOSMatic - Website for generating printable street maps from OSM data. (Source Codestars52)

    • Maps

    Map Styles

  • Terrain Classicstars133 - World-wide CartoCSS port of Stamen's classic terrain style.

    • Public APIs

  • osm.mazdermind - Maps Timestamp to replicate sequences. (Source Codestars7)

    • Tools

    Web Tools

  • Web To OSM Opening Hours - Tool for converting human-readable opening hours to opening_hours tags. (Source Codestars8)
  • OpenStreetMap Welcome Tool - Tool for finding fresh mappers in your area. (Source Codestars26)
  • opening_hours evaluation tool - Tool for evaluating opening_hours tags. (Source Codestars189)
  • YoHours - Tool for generating opening_hours tags. (Source Code)
  • My Notes - Search for finding your old unresolved notes.
  • NLMaps - Website allowing to query OSM data using plain English.
  • Turn Restrictions - Viewer for turn-restrictions and linked errors.

    • Tasking Managers

  • NotesReview - Interface for searching and resolving OSM notes. (Source Codestars35)
  • HOT Tasking Manager - Mapping tasks for supporting humanitarian missions in crisis areas.

    • Additional Resources

    Wiki-Pages

  • OSM Promotional Material Programme - Information on receiving promotional merch such as Stickers.
  • Main Page - An overview page with links to the most useful pages.
  • Beginners' guide - Five-step-guide on what OpenStreetMap is and how it works.
  • Mapping projects - Mapping projects to participate in.

    • Additional Resources

    Websites

  • What OSM? - Tool for finding tools for contributing to OSM by answering three simple questions.
